sEn: Consistency models enable fast one-step generation by directly mapping noise to data, outperforming diffusion models in speed while maintaining high quality.
sZh: 一致性模型通过直接将噪声映射到数据，实现快速单步生成，在保持高质量的同时速度优于扩散模型。
absEn: Diffusion models have significantly advanced the fields of image, audio, and video generation, but they depend on an iterative sampling process that causes slow generation. To overcome this limitation, we propose consistency models, a new family of models that generate high quality samples by directly mapping noise to data. They support fast one-step generation by design, while still allowing multistep sampling to trade compute for sample quality. They also support zero-shot data editing, such as image inpainting, colorization, and super-resolution, without requiring explicit training on these tasks. Consistency models can be trained either by distilling pre-trained diffusion models, or as standalone generative models altogether. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that they outperform existing distillation techniques for diffusion models in one- and few-step sampling, achieving the new state-of-the-art FID of 3.55 on CIFAR-10 and 6.20 on ImageNet 64x64 for one-step generation. When trained in isolation, consistency models become a new family of generative models that can outperform existing one-step, non-adversarial generative models on standard benchmarks such as CIFAR-10, ImageNet 64x64 and LSUN 256x256.
absZh: 扩散模型在图像、音频和视频生成领域取得了显著进展，但它们依赖于迭代采样过程，导致生成速度缓慢。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一致性模型，这是一种新的模型家族，通过直接将噪声映射到数据来生成高质量样本。它们设计上支持快速单步生成，同时仍允许多步采样以在计算量和样本质量之间进行权衡。此外，它们还支持零样本数据编辑，如图像修复、着色和超分辨率，无需针对这些任务进行显式训练。一致性模型可以通过蒸馏预训练的扩散模型来训练，也可以作为独立的生成模型进行训练。通过大量实验，我们证明它们在一步和少步采样中优于现有的扩散模型蒸馏技术，在CIFAR-10上实现了新的最先进FID为3.55，在ImageNet 64x64上为6.20。当单独训练时，一致性模型成为一种新的生成模型家族，在标准基准测试（如CIFAR-10、ImageNet 64x64和LSUN 256x256）上优于现有的单步非对抗生成模型。

contrib.en: Propose consistency models, a new family of generative models that directly map noise to data for fast one-step generation.
contrib.zh: 提出一致性模型，一种直接映射噪声到数据以支持快速单步生成的新型生成模型家族。

contrib.en: Introduce consistency distillation to distill pre-trained diffusion models into consistency models, achieving state-of-the-art FID on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet 64x64.
contrib.zh: 引入一致性蒸馏，将预训练扩散模型蒸馏为一致性模型，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet 64x64上实现最先进FID。

contrib.en: Develop consistency training to train consistency models from scratch without pre-trained diffusion models, establishing them as an independent generative model family.
contrib.zh: 开发一致性训练，无需预训练扩散模型即可从头训练一致性模型，使其成为独立的生成模型家族。

contrib.en: Demonstrate zero-shot data editing capabilities including inpainting, colorization, super-resolution, and stroke-guided editing without task-specific training.
contrib.zh: 展示零样本数据编辑能力，包括图像修复、着色、超分辨率和笔触引导编辑，无需任务特定训练。

contrib.en: Provide theoretical analysis showing consistency models can approximate the true consistency function arbitrarily well with small ODE solver step sizes.
contrib.zh: 提供理论分析，表明一致性模型在ODE求解器步长足够小时可任意逼近真实一致性函数。

contrib.en: Achieve superior performance over progressive distillation and other distillation methods in one- and few-step sampling across multiple datasets.
contrib.zh: 在多个数据集的一步和少步采样中，性能优于渐进蒸馏和其他蒸馏方法。

limits.en: Consistency models may require careful tuning of discretization steps and schedule functions for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 一致性模型可能需要仔细调整离散化步数和调度函数以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: The method relies on the assumption that the FID is unimodal with respect to time points in multistep sampling.
limits.zh: 该方法假设多步采样中FID关于时间点是单峰的。

limits.en: Consistency training loss has higher variance with larger N, potentially slowing convergence in later stages.
limits.zh: 一致性训练损失在N较大时方差更高，可能减慢后期收敛。

limits.en: The approach is evaluated only on image datasets; applicability to other domains like audio or video is not explored.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在图像数据集上评估，未探索在音频或视频等其他领域的适用性。

limits.en: Continuous-time consistency training requires forward-mode automatic differentiation, which may not be efficiently supported in all frameworks.
limits.zh: 连续时间一致性训练需要前向模式自动微分，可能并非所有框架都高效支持。

items.en: Diffusion models have significantly advanced the fields of image, audio, and video generation, but they depend on an iterative sampling process that causes slow generation. To overcome this limitation, we propose consistency models, a new family of models that generate high quality samples by directly mapping noise to data. They support fast one-step generation by design, while still allowing multistep sampling to trade compute for sample quality. They also support zero-shot data editing, such as image inpainting, colorization, and super-resolution, without requiring explicit training on these tasks. Consistency models can be trained either by distilling pre-trained diffusion models, or as standalone generative models altogether. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that they outperform existing distillation techniques for diffusion models in one- and few-step sampling, achieving the new state-of-the-art FID of 3.55 on CIFAR-10 and 6.20 on ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64 for one-step generation. When trained in isolation, consistency models become a new family of generative models that can outperform existing one-step, non-adversarial generative models on standard benchmarks such as CIFAR-10, ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64 and LSUN 256×256256256256\times 256.
items.zh: 扩散模型在图像、音频和视频生成领域取得了显著进展，但它们依赖于迭代采样过程，导致生成速度缓慢。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一致性模型，这是一种新的模型家族，通过直接将噪声映射到数据来生成高质量样本。它们设计上支持快速单步生成，同时仍允许多步采样以在算力和样本质量之间进行权衡。它们还支持零样本数据编辑，如图像修复、着色和超分辨率，而无需在这些任务上进行显式训练。一致性模型可以通过蒸馏预训练的扩散模型来训练，也可以作为独立的生成模型进行训练。通过大量实验，我们证明它们在单步和少步采样中优于现有的扩散模型蒸馏技术，在CIFAR-10上实现了新的最先进FID为3.55，在ImageNet 64×64上实现了6.20。当独立训练时，一致性模型成为一类新的生成模型，可以在标准基准（如CIFAR-10、ImageNet 64×64和LSUN 256×256）上优于现有的单步非对抗生成模型。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Given a Probability Flow (PF) ODE that smoothly converts data to noise, we learn to map any point (e.g., 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡{\mathbf{x}}_{t}, 𝐱t′subscript𝐱superscript𝑡′{\mathbf{x}}_{t^{\prime}}, and 𝐱Tsubscript𝐱𝑇{\mathbf{x}}_{T}) on the ODE trajectory to its origin (e.g., 𝐱0subscript𝐱0{\mathbf{x}}_{0}) for generative modeling. Models of these mappings are called consistency models, as their outputs are trained to be consistent for points on the same trajectory.
items.capZh: 图1：给定一个将数据平滑转换为噪声的概率流（PF）ODE，我们学习将ODE轨迹上的任意点（例如，x_t、x_t'和x_T）映射到其原点（例如，x_0）以进行生成建模。这些映射的模型称为一致性模型，因为它们的输出被训练为对于同一轨迹上的点保持一致。

items.en: Diffusion models (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015; Song & Ermon, 2019, 2020; Ho et al., 2020; Song et al., 2021), also known as score-based generative models, have achieved unprecedented success across multiple fields, including image generation (Dhariwal & Nichol, 2021; Nichol et al., 2021; Ramesh et al., 2022; Saharia et al., 2022; Rombach et al., 2022), audio synthesis (Kong et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2021; Popov et al., 2021), and video generation (Ho et al., 2022b, a). A key feature of diffusion models is the iterative sampling process which progressively removes noise from random initial vectors. This iterative process provides a flexible trade-off of compute and sample quality, as using extra compute for more iterations usually yields samples of better quality. It is also the crux of many zero-shot data editing capabilities of diffusion models, enabling them to solve challenging inverse problems ranging from image inpainting, colorization, stroke-guided image editing, to Computed Tomography and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (Song & Ermon, 2019; Song et al., 2021, 2022, 2023; Kawar et al., 2021, 2022; Chung et al., 2023; Meng et al., 2021). However, compared to single-step generative models like GANs (Goodfellow et al., 2014), VAEs (Kingma & Welling, 2014; Rezende et al., 2014), or normalizing flows (Dinh et al., 2015, 2017; Kingma & Dhariwal, 2018), the iterative generation procedure of diffusion models typically requires 10–2000 times more compute for sample generation (Song & Ermon, 2020; Ho et al., 2020; Song et al., 2021; Zhang & Chen, 2022; Lu et al., 2022), causing slow inference and limited real-time applications.
items.zh: 扩散模型（Sohl-Dickstein等人，2015；Song & Ermon，2019，2020；Ho等人，2020；Song等人，2021），也称为基于分数的生成模型，在多个领域取得了前所未有的成功，包括图像生成（Dhariwal & Nichol，2021；Nichol等人，2021；Ramesh等人，2022；Saharia等人，2022；Rombach等人，2022）、音频合成（Kong等人，2020；Chen等人，2021；Popov等人，2021）和视频生成（Ho等人，2022b，a）。扩散模型的一个关键特征是迭代采样过程，该过程逐步从随机初始向量中去除噪声。这种迭代过程提供了算力和样本质量之间的灵活权衡，因为使用额外的算力进行更多迭代通常会生成更高质量的样本。它也是扩散模型许多零样本数据编辑能力的关键，使它们能够解决从图像修复、着色、笔画引导图像编辑到计算机断层扫描和磁共振成像等具有挑战性的逆问题（Song & Ermon，2019；Song等人，2021，2022，2023；Kawar等人，2021，2022；Chung等人，2023；Meng等人，2021）。然而，与GAN（Goodfellow等人，2014）、VAE（Kingma & Welling，2014；Rezende等人，2014）或归一化流（Dinh等人，2015，2017；Kingma & Dhariwal，2018）等单步生成模型相比，扩散模型的迭代生成过程通常需要10-2000倍更多的算力来生成样本（Song & Ermon，2020；Ho等人，2020；Song等人，2021；Zhang & Chen，2022；Lu等人，2022），导致推理速度慢且实时应用受限。

items.en: Our objective is to create generative models that facilitate efficient, single-step generation without sacrificing important advantages of iterative sampling, such as trading compute for sample quality when necessary, as well as performing zero-shot data editing tasks. As illustrated in Fig. 1, we build on top of the probability flow (PF) ordinary differential equation (ODE) in continuous-time diffusion models (Song et al., 2021), whose trajectories smoothly transition the data distribution into a tractable noise distribution. We propose to learn a model that maps any point at any time step to the trajectory’s starting point. A notable property of our model is self-consistency: points on the same trajectory map to the same initial point. We therefore refer to such models as consistency models. Consistency models allow us to generate data samples (initial points of ODE trajectories, e.g., 𝐱0subscript𝐱0{\mathbf{x}}_{0} in Fig. 1) by converting random noise vectors (endpoints of ODE trajectories, e.g., 𝐱Tsubscript𝐱𝑇{\mathbf{x}}_{T} in Fig. 1) with only one network evaluation. Importantly, by chaining the outputs of consistency models at multiple time steps, we can improve sample quality and perform zero-shot data editing at the cost of more compute, similar to what iterative sampling enables for diffusion models.
items.zh: 我们的目标是创建能够实现高效单步生成的生成模型，同时不牺牲迭代采样的重要优势，例如在必要时用算力换取样本质量，以及执行零样本数据编辑任务。如图1所示，我们建立在连续时间扩散模型（Song等人，2021）中的概率流（PF）常微分方程（ODE）之上，其轨迹将数据分布平滑地转换为易处理的噪声分布。我们提出学习一个模型，将任意时间步的任意点映射到轨迹的起点。我们模型的一个显著特性是自一致性：同一轨迹上的点映射到相同的初始点。因此，我们将此类模型称为一致性模型。一致性模型允许我们通过仅一次网络评估，将随机噪声向量（ODE轨迹的终点，例如图1中的x_T）转换为数据样本（ODE轨迹的初始点，例如图1中的x_0）。重要的是，通过链式使用多个时间步的一致性模型输出，我们可以提高样本质量并以更多算力为代价执行零样本数据编辑，类似于迭代采样为扩散模型所实现的功能。

items.en: To train a consistency model, we offer two methods based on enforcing the self-consistency property. The first method relies on using numerical ODE solvers and a pre-trained diffusion model to generate pairs of adjacent points on a PF ODE trajectory. By minimizing the difference between model outputs for these pairs, we can effectively distill a diffusion model into a consistency model, which allows generating high-quality samples with one network evaluation. By contrast, our second method eliminates the need for a pre-trained diffusion model altogether, allowing us to train a consistency model in isolation. This approach situates consistency models as an independent family of generative models. Importantly, neither approach necessitates adversarial training, and they both place minor constraints on the architecture, allowing the use of flexible neural networks for parameterizing consistency models.
items.zh: 为了训练一致性模型，我们提供了两种基于强制自一致性属性的方法。第一种方法依赖于使用数值ODE求解器和预训练的扩散模型来生成PF ODE轨迹上的相邻点对。通过最小化这些点对模型输出的差异，我们可以有效地将扩散模型蒸馏为一致性模型，从而能够通过一次网络评估生成高质量样本。相比之下，我们的第二种方法完全不需要预训练的扩散模型，允许我们独立训练一致性模型。这种方法将一致性模型定位为一类独立的生成模型。重要的是，这两种方法都不需要对抗训练，并且它们对架构施加了很小的限制，允许使用灵活的神经网络来参数化一致性模型。

items.en: We demonstrate the efficacy of consistency models on several image datasets, including CIFAR-10 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009), ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64 (Deng et al., 2009), and LSUN 256×256256256256\times 256 (Yu et al., 2015). Empirically, we observe that as a distillation approach, consistency models outperform existing diffusion distillation methods like progressive distillation (Salimans & Ho, 2022) across a variety of datasets in few-step generation: On CIFAR-10, consistency models reach new state-of-the-art FIDs of 3.55 and 2.93 for one-step and two-step generation; on ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64, it achieves record-breaking FIDs of 6.20 and 4.70 with one and two network evaluations respectively. When trained as standalone generative models, consistency models can match or surpass the quality of one-step samples from progressive distillation, despite having no access to pre-trained diffusion models. They are also able to outperform many GANs, and existing non-adversarial, single-step generative models across multiple datasets. Furthermore, we show that consistency models can be used to perform a wide range of zero-shot data editing tasks, including image denoising, interpolation, inpainting, colorization, super-resolution, and stroke-guided image editing (SDEdit, Meng et al. (2021)).
items.zh: 我们在多个图像数据集上展示了一致性模型的有效性，包括CIFAR-10（Krizhevsky等人，2009）、ImageNet 64×64（Deng等人，2009）和LSUN 256×256（Yu等人，2015）。实验上，我们观察到，作为一种蒸馏方法，一致性模型在少步生成中优于现有的扩散蒸馏方法，如渐进式蒸馏（Salimans & Ho，2022）：在CIFAR-10上，一致性模型在单步和两步生成中分别达到了新的最先进FID 3.55和2.93；在ImageNet 64×64上，它通过一次和两次网络评估分别实现了创纪录的FID 6.20和4.70。当作为独立生成模型训练时，一致性模型可以匹配或超越渐进式蒸馏的单步样本质量，尽管无法访问预训练的扩散模型。它们还能够优于许多GAN以及多个数据集上现有的非对抗单步生成模型。此外，我们展示了一致性模型可用于执行广泛的零样本数据编辑任务，包括图像去噪、插值、修复、着色、超分辨率和笔画引导图像编辑（SDEdit，Meng等人（2021））。

items.en: Diffusion models are bottlenecked by their slow sampling speed. Clearly, using ODE solvers for sampling requires iterative evaluations of the score model 𝒔ϕ​(𝐱,t)subscript𝒔bold-italic-ϕ𝐱𝑡{\bm{s}}_{\bm{\phi}}({\mathbf{x}},t), which is computationally costly. Existing methods for fast sampling include faster numerical ODE solvers (Song et al., 2020; Zhang & Chen, 2022; Lu et al., 2022; Dockhorn et al., 2022), and distillation techniques (Luhman & Luhman, 2021; Salimans & Ho, 2022; Meng et al., 2022; Zheng et al., 2022). However, ODE solvers still need more than 10 evaluation steps to generate competitive samples. Most distillation methods like Luhman & Luhman (2021) and Zheng et al. (2022) rely on collecting a large dataset of samples from the diffusion model prior to distillation, which itself is computationally expensive. To our best knowledge, the only distillation approach that does not suffer from this drawback is progressive distillation (PD, Salimans & Ho (2022)), with which we compare consistency models extensively in our experiments.
items.zh: 扩散模型受限于其缓慢的采样速度。显然，使用ODE求解器进行采样需要迭代评估分数模型s_φ(x,t)，这计算成本高昂。现有的快速采样方法包括更快的数值ODE求解器（Song等人，2020；Zhang & Chen，2022；Lu等人，2022；Dockhorn等人，2022）和蒸馏技术（Luhman & Luhman，2021；Salimans & Ho，2022；Meng等人，2022；Zheng等人，2022）。然而，ODE求解器仍然需要超过10个评估步骤才能生成有竞争力的样本。大多数蒸馏方法，如Luhman & Luhman（2021）和Zheng等人（2022），依赖于在蒸馏之前从扩散模型收集大量样本数据集，这本身计算成本高昂。据我们所知，唯一没有此缺点的蒸馏方法是渐进式蒸馏（PD，Salimans & Ho（2022）），我们在实验中与一致性模型进行了广泛比较。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Consistency models are trained to map points on any trajectory of the PF ODE to the trajectory’s origin.
items.capZh: 图2：一致性模型被训练为将PF ODE任意轨迹上的点映射到轨迹的起点。

items.en: We propose consistency models, a new type of models that support single-step generation at the core of its design, while still allowing iterative generation for trade-offs between sample quality and compute, and zero-shot data editing. Consistency models can be trained in either the distillation mode or the isolation mode. In the former case, consistency models distill the knowledge of pre-trained diffusion models into a single-step sampler, significantly improving other distillation approaches in sample quality, while allowing zero-shot image editing applications. In the latter case, consistency models are trained in isolation, with no dependence on pre-trained diffusion models. This makes them an independent new class of generative models.
items.zh: 我们提出了一致性模型，这是一种新型模型，其核心设计支持单步生成，同时仍允许迭代生成以在样本质量和算力之间进行权衡，并支持零样本数据编辑。一致性模型可以在蒸馏模式或独立模式下训练。在前一种情况下，一致性模型将预训练扩散模型的知识蒸馏到单步采样器中，在样本质量上显著优于其他蒸馏方法，同时允许零样本图像编辑应用。在后一种情况下，一致性模型独立训练，不依赖于预训练的扩散模型。这使它们成为一类独立的新型生成模型。

items.en: Below we introduce the definition, parameterization, and sampling of consistency models, plus a brief discussion on their applications to zero-shot data editing.
items.zh: 下面我们介绍一致性模型的定义、参数化和采样，并简要讨论其在零样本数据编辑中的应用。

items.en: Definition Given a solution trajectory {𝐱t}t∈[ϵ,T]subscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑡italic-ϵ𝑇\{{\mathbf{x}}_{t}\}_{t\in[\epsilon,T]} of the PF ODE in Eq. 2, we define the consistency function as 𝒇:(𝐱t,t)↦𝐱ϵ:𝒇maps-tosubscript𝐱𝑡𝑡subscript𝐱italic-ϵ{\bm{f}}:({\mathbf{x}}_{t},t)\mapsto{\mathbf{x}}_{\epsilon}. A consistency function has the property of self-consistency: its outputs are consistent for arbitrary pairs of (𝐱t,t)subscript𝐱𝑡𝑡({\mathbf{x}}_{t},t) that belong to the same PF ODE trajectory, i.e., 𝒇​(𝐱t,t)=𝒇​(𝐱t′,t′)𝒇subscript𝐱𝑡𝑡𝒇subscript𝐱superscript𝑡′superscript𝑡′{\bm{f}}({\mathbf{x}}_{t},t)={\bm{f}}({\mathbf{x}}_{t^{\prime}},t^{\prime}) for all t,t′∈[ϵ,T]𝑡superscript𝑡′italic-ϵ𝑇t,t^{\prime}\in[\epsilon,T]. As illustrated in Fig. 2, the goal of a consistency model, symbolized as 𝒇𝜽subscript𝒇𝜽{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}, is to estimate this consistency function 𝒇𝒇{\bm{f}} from data by learning to enforce the self-consistency property (details in Sections 4 and 5). Note that a similar definition is used for neural flows (Biloš et al., 2021) in the context of neural ODEs (Chen et al., 2018). Compared to neural flows, however, we do not enforce consistency models to be invertible.
items.zh: 定义 给定式2中PF ODE的一个解轨迹{x_t}_{t∈[ε,T]}，我们将一致性函数定义为f:(x_t,t)↦x_ε。一致性函数具有自一致性属性：对于属于同一PF ODE轨迹的任意(x_t,t)对，其输出是一致的，即对于所有t,t'∈[ε,T]，有f(x_t,t)=f(x_t',t')。如图2所示，一致性模型（符号化为f_θ）的目标是通过学习强制自一致性属性（第4节和第5节详述）来从数据中估计这个一致性函数f。注意，在神经ODE（Chen等人，2018）的背景下，神经流（Biloš等人，2021）使用了类似的定义。然而，与神经流相比，我们不强制一致性模型可逆。

items.en: Parameterization For any consistency function 𝒇​(⋅,⋅)𝒇⋅⋅{\bm{f}}(\cdot,\cdot), we have 𝒇​(𝐱ϵ,ϵ)=𝐱ϵ𝒇subscript𝐱italic-ϵitalic-ϵsubscript𝐱italic-ϵ{\bm{f}}({\mathbf{x}}_{\epsilon},\epsilon)={\mathbf{x}}_{\epsilon}, i.e., 𝒇​(⋅,ϵ)𝒇⋅italic-ϵ{\bm{f}}(\cdot,\epsilon) is an identity function. We call this constraint the boundary condition. All consistency models have to meet this boundary condition, as it plays a crucial role in the successful training of consistency models. This boundary condition is also the most confining architectural constraint on consistency models. For consistency models based on deep neural networks, we discuss two ways to implement this boundary condition almost for free. Suppose we have a free-form deep neural network F𝜽​(𝐱,t)subscript𝐹𝜽𝐱𝑡F_{\bm{\theta}}({\mathbf{x}},t) whose output has the same dimensionality as 𝐱𝐱{\mathbf{x}}. The first way is to simply parameterize the consistency model as

This way, the consistency model is differentiable at t=ϵ𝑡italic-ϵt=\epsilon if F𝜽​(𝐱,t),cskip​(t),cout​(t)subscript𝐹𝜽𝐱𝑡subscript𝑐skip𝑡subscript𝑐out𝑡F_{\bm{\theta}}({\mathbf{x}},t),c_{\text{skip}}(t),c_{\text{out}}(t) are all differentiable, which is critical for training continuous-time consistency models (Sections B.1 and B.2). We therefore follow the second parameterization in all experiments.
items.zh: 其中c_skip(t)和c_out(t)是可微函数，满足c_skip(ε)=1且c_out(ε)=0。这样，如果F_θ(x,t)、c_skip(t)、c_out(t)都是可微的，则一致性模型在t=ε处可微，这对于训练连续时间一致性模型（附录B.1和B.2）至关重要。式5中的参数化与许多成功的扩散模型（Karras等人，2022；Balaji等人，2022）非常相似，使得更容易借用强大的扩散模型架构来构建一致性模型。因此，我们在所有实验中采用第二种参数化。

items.en: Sampling With a well-trained consistency model 𝒇𝜽​(⋅,⋅)subscript𝒇𝜽⋅⋅{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}(\cdot,\cdot), we can generate samples by sampling from the initial distribution 𝐱^T∼𝒩​(𝟎,T2​𝑰)similar-tosubscript^𝐱𝑇𝒩0superscript𝑇2𝑰\hat{{\mathbf{x}}}_{T}\sim\mathcal{N}(\bm{0},T^{2}{\bm{I}}) and then evaluating the consistency model for 𝐱^ϵ=𝒇𝜽​(𝐱^T,T)subscript^𝐱italic-ϵsubscript𝒇𝜽subscript^𝐱𝑇𝑇\hat{{\mathbf{x}}}_{\epsilon}={\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}(\hat{{\mathbf{x}}}_{T},T). This involves only one forward pass through the consistency model and therefore generates samples in a single step. Importantly, one can also evaluate the consistency model multiple times by alternating denoising and noise injection steps for improved sample quality. Summarized in Algorithm 1, this multistep sampling procedure provides the flexibility to trade compute for sample quality. It also has important applications in zero-shot data editing. In practice, we find time points {τ1,τ2,⋯,τN−1}subscript𝜏1subscript𝜏2⋯subscript𝜏𝑁1\{\tau_{1},\tau_{2},\cdots,\tau_{N-1}\} in Algorithm 1 with a greedy algorithm, where the time points are pinpointed one at a time using ternary search to optimize the FID of samples obtained from Algorithm 1. This assumes that given prior time points, the FID is a unimodal function of the next time point. We find this assumption to hold empirically in our experiments, and leave the exploration of better strategies as future work.
items.zh: 采样 使用训练好的一致性模型f_θ(·,·)，我们可以通过从初始分布x̂_T∼N(0,T^2 I)采样，然后评估一致性模型得到x̂_ε=f_θ(x̂_T,T)来生成样本。这仅涉及一次前向传播通过一致性模型，因此单步生成样本。重要的是，我们还可以通过交替去噪和噪声注入步骤多次评估一致性模型，以提高样本质量。算法1总结了这一多步采样过程，它提供了用算力换取样本质量的灵活性。它在零样本数据编辑中也有重要应用。在实践中，我们使用贪心算法找到算法1中的时间点{τ_1,τ_2,...,τ_{N-1}}，其中时间点通过三元搜索一次确定一个，以优化从算法1获得的样本的FID。这假设给定先前的时间点，FID是下一个时间点的单峰函数。我们在实验中经验性地发现这一假设成立，并将更好策略的探索留作未来工作。

items.en: Zero-Shot Data Editing Similar to diffusion models, consistency models enable various data editing and manipulation applications in zero shot; they do not require explicit training to perform these tasks. For example, consistency models define a one-to-one mapping from a Gaussian noise vector to a data sample. Similar to latent variable models like GANs, VAEs, and normalizing flows, consistency models can easily interpolate between samples by traversing the latent space (Fig. 11). As consistency models are trained to recover 𝐱ϵsubscript𝐱italic-ϵ{\mathbf{x}}_{\epsilon} from any noisy input 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡{\mathbf{x}}_{t} where t∈[ϵ,T]𝑡italic-ϵ𝑇t\in[\epsilon,T], they can perform denoising for various noise levels (Fig. 12). Moreover, the multistep generation procedure in Algorithm 1 is useful for solving certain inverse problems in zero shot by using an iterative replacement procedure similar to that of diffusion models (Song & Ermon, 2019; Song et al., 2021; Ho et al., 2022b). This enables many applications in the context of image editing, including inpainting (Fig. 10), colorization (Fig. 8), super-resolution (Fig. 6(b)) and stroke-guided image editing (Fig. 13) as in SDEdit (Meng et al., 2021). In Section 6.3, we empirically demonstrate the power of consistency models on many zero-shot image editing tasks.
items.zh: 零样本数据编辑 与扩散模型类似，一致性模型支持零样本下的多种数据编辑和操作应用；它们不需要针对这些任务进行显式训练。例如，一致性模型定义了从高斯噪声向量到数据样本的一对一映射。与GAN、VAE和归一化流等潜变量模型类似，一致性模型可以通过遍历潜空间轻松地在样本之间进行插值（图11）。由于一致性模型被训练为从任意带噪输入 x_t（t∈[ϵ,T]）恢复 x_ϵ，它们可以对各种噪声水平进行去噪（图12）。此外，算法1中的多步生成过程通过使用类似于扩散模型的迭代替换过程（Song & Ermon, 2019; Song et al., 2021; Ho et al., 2022b），有助于在零样本下解决某些逆问题。这使得在图像编辑的许多应用中成为可能，包括修复（图10）、着色（图8）、超分辨率（图6(b)）和笔触引导的图像编辑（图13），如SDEdit（Meng et al., 2021）。在第6.3节中，我们通过实验证明了一致性模型在许多零样本图像编辑任务上的能力。

items.en: The overall training procedure is summarized in Algorithm 2. In alignment with the convention in deep reinforcement learning (Mnih et al., 2013, 2015; Lillicrap et al., 2015) and momentum based contrastive learning (Grill et al., 2020; He et al., 2020), we refer to 𝒇𝜽−subscript𝒇superscript𝜽{\bm{f}}_{{\bm{\theta}}^{-}} as the “target network”, and 𝒇𝜽subscript𝒇𝜽{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}} as the “online network”. We find that compared to simply setting 𝜽−=𝜽superscript𝜽𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-}={\bm{\theta}}, the EMA update and “stopgrad” operator in Eq. 8 can greatly stabilize the training process and improve the final performance of the consistency model.
items.zh: 整体训练过程总结在算法2中。与深度强化学习（Mnih et al., 2013, 2015; Lillicrap et al., 2015）和基于动量的对比学习（Grill et al., 2020; He et al., 2020）中的惯例一致，我们将 f_{θ^-} 称为“目标网络”，将 f_θ 称为“在线网络”。我们发现，与简单设置 θ^- = θ 相比，EMA更新和式8中的“stopgrad”算子可以极大地稳定训练过程并提高一致性模型的最终性能。

items.en: Since 𝜽−superscript𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-} is a running average of the history of 𝜽𝜽{\bm{\theta}}, we have 𝜽−=𝜽superscript𝜽𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-}={\bm{\theta}} when the optimization of Algorithm 2 converges. That is, the target and online consistency models will eventually match each other. If the consistency model additionally achieves zero consistency distillation loss, then Theorem 1 implies that, under some regularity conditions, the estimated consistency model can become arbitrarily accurate, as long as the step size of the ODE solver is sufficiently small. Importantly, our boundary condition 𝒇𝜽​(𝐱,ϵ)≡𝐱subscript𝒇𝜽𝐱italic-ϵ𝐱{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}({\mathbf{x}},\epsilon)\equiv{\mathbf{x}} precludes the trivial solution 𝒇𝜽​(𝐱,t)≡𝟎subscript𝒇𝜽𝐱𝑡0{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}({\mathbf{x}},t)\equiv\bm{0} from arising in consistency model training.
items.zh: 由于 θ^- 是 θ 历史的运行平均值，当算法2的优化收敛时，我们有 θ^- = θ。也就是说，目标一致性模型和在线一致性模型最终将相互匹配。如果一致性模型还达到了零一致性蒸馏损失，那么定理1表明，在一些正则条件下，只要ODE求解器的步长足够小，估计的一致性模型可以变得任意精确。重要的是，我们的边界条件 f_θ(x,ϵ) ≡ x 排除了在一致性模型训练中出现平凡解 f_θ(x,t) ≡ 0 的可能性。

items.en: The consistency distillation loss ℒCDN​(𝜽,𝜽−;ϕ)superscriptsubscriptℒCD𝑁𝜽superscript𝜽bold-italic-ϕ\mathcal{L}_{\text{CD}}^{N}({\bm{\theta}},{\bm{\theta}}^{-};{\bm{\phi}}) can be extended to hold for infinitely many time steps (N→∞→𝑁N\to\infty) if 𝜽−=𝜽superscript𝜽𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-}={\bm{\theta}} or 𝜽−=stopgrad⁡(𝜽)superscript𝜽stopgrad𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-}=\operatorname{stopgrad}({\bm{\theta}}). The resulting continuous-time loss functions do not require specifying N𝑁N nor the time steps {t1,t2,⋯,tN}subscript𝑡1subscript𝑡2⋯subscript𝑡𝑁\{t_{1},t_{2},\cdots,t_{N}\}. Nonetheless, they involve Jacobian-vector products and require forward-mode automatic differentiation for efficient implementation, which may not be well-supported in some deep learning frameworks. We provide these continuous-time distillation loss functions in Theorems 3, 4 and 5, and relegate details to Section B.1.

items.en: Consistency models can be trained without relying on any pre-trained diffusion models. This differs from existing diffusion distillation techniques, making consistency models a new independent family of generative models.
items.zh: 一致性模型可以在不依赖任何预训练扩散模型的情况下进行训练。这与现有的扩散蒸馏技术不同，使一致性模型成为一个新的独立生成模型家族。

items.en: We refer to Eq. 10 as the consistency training (CT) loss. Crucially, ℒ​(𝜽,𝜽−)ℒ𝜽superscript𝜽\mathcal{L}({\bm{\theta}},{\bm{\theta}}^{-}) only depends on the online network 𝒇𝜽subscript𝒇𝜽{\bm{f}}_{\bm{\theta}}, and the target network 𝒇𝜽−subscript𝒇superscript𝜽{\bm{f}}_{{\bm{\theta}}^{-}}, while being completely agnostic to diffusion model parameters ϕbold-italic-ϕ{\bm{\phi}}. The loss function ℒ​(𝜽,𝜽−)≥O​(Δ​t)ℒ𝜽superscript𝜽𝑂Δ𝑡\mathcal{L}({\bm{\theta}},{\bm{\theta}}^{-})\geq O(\Delta t) decreases at a slower rate than the remainder o​(Δ​t)𝑜Δ𝑡o(\Delta t) and thus will dominate the loss in Eq. 9 as N→∞→𝑁N\to\infty and Δ​t→0→Δ𝑡0\Delta t\to 0.
items.zh: 我们将式(10)称为一致性训练（CT）损失。关键在于，ℒ​(𝜽,𝜽−)仅依赖于在线网络 𝒇𝜽 和目标网络 𝒇𝜽−，而与扩散模型参数 ϕ 完全无关。损失函数 ℒ​(𝜽,𝜽−)≥O​(Δ​t) 的衰减速度慢于余项 o​(Δ​t)，因此当 N→∞ 且 Δ​t→0 时，它将主导式(9)中的损失。

items.en: For improved practical performance, we propose to progressively increase N𝑁N during training according to a schedule function N​(⋅)𝑁⋅N(\cdot). The intuition (cf., Fig. 3(d)) is that the consistency training loss has less “variance” but more “bias” with respect to the underlying consistency distillation loss (i.e., the left-hand side of Eq. 9) when N𝑁N is small (i.e., Δ​tΔ𝑡\Delta t is large), which facilitates faster convergence at the beginning of training. On the contrary, it has more “variance” but less “bias” when N𝑁N is large (i.e., Δ​tΔ𝑡\Delta t is small), which is desirable when closer to the end of training. For best performance, we also find that μ𝜇\mu should change along with N𝑁N, according to a schedule function μ​(⋅)𝜇⋅\mu(\cdot). The full algorithm of consistency training is provided in Algorithm 3, and the schedule functions used in our experiments are given in Appendix C.
items.zh: 为提升实际性能，我们建议根据调度函数 N​(⋅) 在训练过程中逐步增加 N。直觉上（参见图3(d)），当 N 较小（即 Δ​t 较大）时，一致性训练损失相对于底层的一致性蒸馏损失（即式(9)左侧）具有更小的“方差”但更大的“偏差”，这有助于训练初期的快速收敛。相反，当 N 较大（即 Δ​t 较小）时，它具有更大的“方差”但更小的“偏差”，这在训练接近尾声时更为理想。为获得最佳性能，我们还发现 μ 应随 N 变化，依据调度函数 μ​(⋅)。一致性训练的完整算法见算法3，实验中使用的调度函数见附录C。

items.en: Similar to consistency distillation, the consistency training loss ℒCTN​(𝜽,𝜽−)superscriptsubscriptℒCT𝑁𝜽superscript𝜽\mathcal{L}_{\text{CT}}^{N}({\bm{\theta}},{\bm{\theta}}^{-}) can be extended to hold in continuous time (i.e., N→∞→𝑁N\to\infty) if 𝜽−=stopgrad⁡(𝜽)superscript𝜽stopgrad𝜽{\bm{\theta}}^{-}=\operatorname{stopgrad}({\bm{\theta}}), as shown in Theorem 6. This continuous-time loss function does not require schedule functions for N𝑁N or μ𝜇\mu, but requires forward-mode automatic differentiation for efficient implementation. Unlike the discrete-time CT loss, there is no undesirable “bias” associated with the continuous-time objective, as we effectively take Δ​t→0→Δ𝑡0\Delta t\to 0 in Theorem 2. We relegate more details to Section B.2.
items.zh: 与一致性蒸馏类似，若 𝜽−=stopgrad⁡(𝜽)，则一致性训练损失 ℒCTN​(𝜽,𝜽−) 可推广至连续时间情形（即 N→∞），如定理6所示。该连续时间损失函数不需要 N 或 μ 的调度函数，但需要前向模式自动微分以实现高效实现。与离散时间CT损失不同，连续时间目标函数不存在不希望的“偏差”，因为我们在定理2中实际上令 Δ​t→0。更多细节见附录B.2。

items.en: We employ consistency distillation and consistency training to learn consistency models on real image datasets, including CIFAR-10 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009), ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64 (Deng et al., 2009), LSUN Bedroom 256×256256256256\times 256, and LSUN Cat 256×256256256256\times 256 (Yu et al., 2015). Results are compared according to Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, Heusel et al. (2017), lower is better), Inception Score (IS, Salimans et al. (2016), higher is better), Precision (Prec., Kynkäänniemi et al. (2019), higher is better), and Recall (Rec., Kynkäänniemi et al. (2019), higher is better). Additional experimental details are provided in Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们采用一致性蒸馏和一致性训练在真实图像数据集上学习一致性模型，包括CIFAR-10 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009)、ImageNet 64×64 (Deng et al., 2009)、LSUN Bedroom 256×256 和 LSUN Cat 256×256 (Yu et al., 2015)。结果根据Fréchet Inception Distance（FID, Heusel et al. (2017)，越低越好）、Inception Score（IS, Salimans et al. (2016)，越高越好）、Precision（Prec., Kynkäänniemi et al. (2019)，越高越好）和Recall（Rec., Kynkäänniemi et al. (2019)，越高越好）进行比较。更多实验细节见附录C。

items.capEn: (c) N𝑁N with Heun solver in CD.
(d) Adaptive N𝑁N and μ𝜇\mu in CT.

items.en: We perform a series of experiments on CIFAR-10 to understand the effect of various hyperparameters on the performance of consistency models trained by consistency distillation (CD) and consistency training (CT). We first focus on the effect of the metric function d​(⋅,⋅)𝑑⋅⋅d(\cdot,\cdot), the ODE solver, and the number of discretization steps N𝑁N in CD, then investigate the effect of the schedule functions N​(⋅)𝑁⋅N(\cdot) and μ​(⋅)𝜇⋅\mu(\cdot) in CT.
items.zh: 我们在CIFAR-10上进行了一系列实验，以理解各种超参数对通过一致性蒸馏（CD）和一致性训练（CT）训练的一致性模型性能的影响。我们首先关注CD中度量函数 d​(⋅,⋅)、ODE求解器和离散化步数 N 的影响，然后研究CT中调度函数 N​(⋅) 和 μ​(⋅) 的影响。

items.en: To set up our experiments for CD, we consider the squared ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} distance d​(𝐱,𝐲)=‖𝐱−𝐲‖22𝑑𝐱𝐲subscriptsuperscriptnorm𝐱𝐲22d({\mathbf{x}},{\mathbf{y}})=\|{\mathbf{x}}-{\mathbf{y}}\|^{2}_{2}, ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} distance d​(𝐱,𝐲)=‖𝐱−𝐲‖1𝑑𝐱𝐲subscriptnorm𝐱𝐲1d({\mathbf{x}},{\mathbf{y}})=\|{\mathbf{x}}-{\mathbf{y}}\|_{1}, and the Learned Perceptual Image Patch Similarity (LPIPS, Zhang et al. (2018)) as the metric function. For the ODE solver, we compare Euler’s forward method and Heun’s second order method as detailed in Karras et al. (2022). For the number of discretization steps N𝑁N, we compare N∈{9,12,18,36,50,60,80,120}𝑁9121836506080120N\in\{9,12,18,36,50,60,80,120\}. All consistency models trained by CD in our experiments are initialized with the corresponding pre-trained diffusion models, whereas models trained by CT are randomly initialized.
items.zh: 为设置CD实验，我们考虑平方 ℓ2 距离 d​(𝐱,𝐲)=‖𝐱−𝐲‖22、ℓ1 距离 d​(𝐱,𝐲)=‖𝐱−𝐲‖1 以及学习感知图像块相似度（LPIPS, Zhang et al. (2018)）作为度量函数。对于ODE求解器，我们比较了Karras et al. (2022)中详述的欧拉前向方法和Heun二阶方法。对于离散化步数 N，我们比较了 N∈{9,12,18,36,50,60,80,120}。实验中所有通过CD训练的一致性模型均使用相应的预训练扩散模型初始化，而通过CT训练的模型则随机初始化。

items.en: As visualized in Fig. 3(a), the optimal metric for CD is LPIPS, which outperforms both ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} and ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} by a large margin over all training iterations. This is expected as the outputs of consistency models are images on CIFAR-10, and LPIPS is specifically designed for measuring the similarity between natural images. Next, we investigate which ODE solver and which discretization step N𝑁N work the best for CD. As shown in Figs. 3(b) and 3(c), Heun ODE solver and N=18𝑁18N=18 are the best choices. Both are in line with the recommendation of Karras et al. (2022) despite the fact that we are training consistency models, not diffusion models. Moreover, Fig. 3(b) shows that with the same N𝑁N, Heun’s second order solver uniformly outperforms Euler’s first order solver. This corroborates with Theorem 1, which states that the optimal consistency models trained by higher order ODE solvers have smaller estimation errors with the same N𝑁N. The results of Fig. 3(c) also indicate that once N𝑁N is sufficiently large, the performance of CD becomes insensitive to N𝑁N. Given these insights, we hereafter use LPIPS and Heun ODE solver for CD unless otherwise stated. For N𝑁N in CD, we follow the suggestions in Karras et al. (2022) on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64. We tune N𝑁N separately on other datasets (details in Appendix C).
items.zh: 如图3(a)所示，CD的最佳度量是LPIPS，它在所有训练迭代中均大幅优于 ℓ1 和 ℓ2。这是预期的，因为一致性模型的输出是CIFAR-10上的图像，而LPIPS专门设计用于测量自然图像之间的相似性。接下来，我们研究哪种ODE求解器和离散化步数 N 对CD最有效。如图3(b)和3(c)所示，Heun ODE求解器和 N=18 是最佳选择。两者均与Karras et al. (2022)的建议一致，尽管我们训练的是一致性模型而非扩散模型。此外，图3(b)显示，在相同 N 下，Heun二阶求解器一致优于欧拉一阶求解器。这证实了定理1，该定理指出使用高阶ODE求解器训练的最优一致性模型在相同 N 下具有更小的估计误差。图3(c)的结果还表明，一旦 N 足够大，CD的性能对 N 变得不敏感。基于这些见解，除非另有说明，我们后续使用LPIPS和Heun ODE求解器进行CD。对于CD中的 N，我们遵循Karras et al. (2022)在CIFAR-10和ImageNet 64×64上的建议。我们在其他数据集上单独调整 N（详见附录C）。

items.en: Due to the strong connection between CD and CT, we adopt LPIPS for our CT experiments throughout this paper. Unlike CD, there is no need for using Heun’s second order solver in CT as the loss function does not rely on any particular numerical ODE solver. As demonstrated in Fig. 3(d), the convergence of CT is highly sensitive to N𝑁N—smaller N𝑁N leads to faster convergence but worse samples, whereas larger N𝑁N leads to slower convergence but better samples upon convergence. This matches our analysis in Section 5, and motivates our practical choice of progressively growing N𝑁N and μ𝜇\mu for CT to balance the trade-off between convergence speed and sample quality. As shown in Fig. 3(d), adaptive schedules of N𝑁N and μ𝜇\mu significantly improve the convergence speed and sample quality of CT. In our experiments, we tune the schedules N​(⋅)𝑁⋅N(\cdot) and μ​(⋅)𝜇⋅\mu(\cdot) separately for images of different resolutions, with more details in Appendix C.
items.zh: 由于CD和CT之间的强关联，我们在本文的CT实验中均采用LPIPS。与CD不同，CT中无需使用Heun二阶求解器，因为损失函数不依赖于任何特定的数值ODE求解器。如图3(d)所示，CT的收敛对 N 高度敏感——较小的 N 导致更快的收敛但样本质量较差，而较大的 N 导致较慢的收敛但收敛后样本质量更好。这与我们在第5节中的分析一致，并促使我们实际选择逐步增加 N 和 μ 以平衡收敛速度与样本质量之间的权衡。如图3(d)所示，N 和 μ 的自适应调度显著提升了CT的收敛速度和样本质量。在我们的实验中，我们针对不同分辨率的图像分别调整 N​(⋅) 和 μ​(⋅) 的调度，更多细节见附录C。

items.en: Distillation In current literature, the most directly comparable approach to our consistency distillation (CD) is progressive distillation (PD, Salimans & Ho (2022)); both are thus far the only distillation approaches that do not construct synthetic data before distillation. In stark contrast, other distillation techniques, such as knowledge distillation (Luhman & Luhman, 2021) and DFNO (Zheng et al., 2022), have to prepare a large synthetic dataset by generating numerous samples from the diffusion model with expensive numerical ODE/SDE solvers. We perform comprehensive comparison for PD and CD on CIFAR-10, ImageNet 64×64646464\times 64, and LSUN 256×256256256256\times 256, with all results reported in Fig. 4. All methods distill from an EDM (Karras et al., 2022) model that we pre-trained in-house. We note that across all sampling iterations, using the LPIPS metric uniformly improves PD compared to the squared ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} distance in the original paper of Salimans & Ho (2022). Both PD and CD improve as we take more sampling steps. We find that CD uniformly outperforms PD across all datasets, sampling steps, and metric functions considered, except for single-step generation on Bedroom 256×256256256256\times 256, where CD with ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} slightly underperforms PD with ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2}. As shown in Table 2, CD even outperforms distillation approaches that require synthetic dataset construction, such as Knowledge Distillation (Luhman & Luhman, 2021) and DFNO (Zheng et al., 2022).
items.zh: 蒸馏 在现有文献中，与我们的一致性蒸馏（CD）最直接可比的方法是渐进式蒸馏（PD, Salimans & Ho (2022)）；两者是迄今为止仅有的在蒸馏前不构建合成数据的蒸馏方法。相比之下，其他蒸馏技术，如知识蒸馏（Luhman & Luhman, 2021）和DFNO（Zheng et al., 2022），必须通过使用昂贵的数值ODE/SDE求解器从扩散模型生成大量样本来准备大型合成数据集。我们在CIFAR-10、ImageNet 64×64和LSUN 256×256上对PD和CD进行了全面比较，所有结果报告在图4中。所有方法均从我们内部预训练的EDM（Karras et al., 2022）模型蒸馏。我们注意到，在所有采样迭代中，使用LPIPS指标相比Salimans & Ho (2022)原始论文中的平方ℓ2距离，一致地改进了PD。PD和CD都随着采样步数的增加而改进。我们发现CD在所有数据集、采样步数和考虑的指标函数上一致优于PD，除了在Bedroom 256×256上的单步生成中，使用ℓ2的CD略逊于使用ℓ2的PD。如表2所示，CD甚至优于需要合成数据集构建的蒸馏方法，如知识蒸馏（Luhman & Luhman, 2021）和DFNO（Zheng et al., 2022）。

items.en: Direct Generation In Tables 2 and 2, we compare the sample quality of consistency training (CT) with other generative models using one-step and two-step generation. We also include PD and CD results for reference. Both tables report PD results obtained from the ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} metric function, as this is the default setting used in the original paper of Salimans & Ho (2022). For fair comparison, we ensure PD and CD distill the same EDM models. In Tables 2 and 2, we observe that CT outperforms existing single-step, non-adversarial generative models, i.e., VAEs and normalizing flows, by a significant margin on CIFAR-10. Moreover, CT achieves comparable quality to one-step samples from PD without relying on distillation. In Fig. 5, we provide EDM samples (top), single-step CT samples (middle), and two-step CT samples (bottom). In Appendix E, we show additional samples for both CD and CT in Figs. 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20 and 21. Importantly, all samples obtained from the same initial noise vector share significant structural similarity, even though CT and EDM models are trained independently from one another. This indicates that CT is less likely to suffer from mode collapse, as EDMs do not.
items.zh: 直接生成 在表2和表2中，我们使用一步和两步生成比较了一致性训练（CT）与其他生成模型的样本质量。我们还提供了PD和CD的结果以供参考。两个表格均报告了使用ℓ2度量函数获得的PD结果，因为这是Salimans & Ho (2022)原始论文中使用的默认设置。为了公平比较，我们确保PD和CD蒸馏相同的EDM模型。在表2和表2中，我们观察到CT在CIFAR-10上显著优于现有的单步非对抗生成模型，即VAE和归一化流。此外，CT在不依赖蒸馏的情况下达到了与PD一步样本相当的质量。在图5中，我们提供了EDM样本（上）、单步CT样本（中）和两步CT样本（下）。在附录E中，我们在图14、15、16、17、18、19、20和21中展示了CD和CT的额外样本。重要的是，即使CT和EDM模型是独立训练的，从相同初始噪声向量获得的所有样本都共享显著的结构相似性。这表明CT不太可能遭受模式崩溃，因为EDM不会。

items.en: Similar to diffusion models, consistency models allow zero-shot image editing by modifying the multistep sampling process in Algorithm 1. We demonstrate this capability with a consistency model trained on the LSUN bedroom dataset using consistency distillation. In Fig. 6(a), we show such a consistency model can colorize gray-scale bedroom images at test time, even though it has never been trained on colorization tasks. In Fig. 6(b), we show the same consistency model can generate high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs. In Fig. 6(c), we additionally demonstrate that it can generate images based on stroke inputs created by humans, as in SDEdit for diffusion models (Meng et al., 2021). Again, this editing capability is zero-shot, as the model has not been trained on stroke inputs. In Appendix D, we additionally demonstrate the zero-shot capability of consistency models on inpainting (Fig. 10), interpolation (Fig. 11) and denoising (Fig. 12), with more examples on colorization (Fig. 8), super-resolution (Fig. 9) and stroke-guided image generation (Fig. 13).
items.zh: 与扩散模型类似，一致性模型允许通过修改算法1中的多步采样过程进行零样本图像编辑。我们使用通过一致性蒸馏在LSUN卧室数据集上训练的一致性模型展示了这一能力。在图6(a)中，我们展示了这样的一致性模型可以在测试时对灰度卧室图像进行彩色化，尽管它从未在彩色化任务上训练过。在图6(b)中，我们展示了相同的一致性模型可以从低分辨率输入生成高分辨率图像。在图6(c)中，我们还展示了它可以基于人类创建的笔画输入生成图像，类似于扩散模型的SDEdit（Meng et al., 2021）。同样，这种编辑能力是零样本的，因为模型没有在笔画输入上训练过。在附录D中，我们还在修复（图10）、插值（图11）和去噪（图12）上展示了一致性模型的零样本能力，并在彩色化（图8）、超分辨率（图9）和笔画引导图像生成（图13）上提供了更多示例。

items.en: We have introduced consistency models, a type of generative models that are specifically designed to support one-step and few-step generation. We have empirically demonstrated that our consistency distillation method outshines the existing distillation techniques for diffusion models on multiple image benchmarks and small sampling iterations. Furthermore, as a standalone generative model, consistency models generate better samples than existing single-step generation models except for GANs. Similar to diffusion models, they also allow zero-shot image editing applications such as inpainting, colorization, super-resolution, denoising, interpolation, and stroke-guided image generation.
items.zh: 我们介绍了一致性模型，这是一类专门设计用于支持一步和少步生成的生成模型。我们通过实验证明，在多个图像基准和少量采样迭代上，我们的一致性蒸馏方法优于现有的扩散模型蒸馏技术。此外，作为独立的生成模型，一致性模型生成的样本优于除GANs外的现有单步生成模型。与扩散模型类似，它们还允许零样本图像编辑应用，如修复、彩色化、超分辨率、去噪、插值和笔画引导图像生成。

items.en: In addition, consistency models share striking similarities with techniques employed in other fields, including deep Q-learning (Mnih et al., 2015) and momentum-based contrastive learning (Grill et al., 2020; He et al., 2020). This offers exciting prospects for cross-pollination of ideas and methods among these diverse fields.
items.zh: 此外，一致性模型与其他领域使用的技术有惊人的相似之处，包括深度Q学习（Mnih et al., 2015）和基于动量的对比学习（Grill et al., 2020; He et al., 2020）。这为这些不同领域之间的思想和方法交叉融合提供了令人兴奋的前景。
